Test Steps: 1. Go to /login 2. Enter valid Agent Email/Pass 3. Submit

Test Title: Verify Agent cannot access Admin Panel

Test Steps: 1. Go to Search 2. Set Min Price = $100k Max Price = $500k 3. Search
Expected Result: Only properties between $100k and $500k are displayed.

Test Steps: 1. Set Min Price = $0 Max Price = -$50 3. Search
Expected Result: Validation error shown. Negative prices not accepted.

Test Title: Verify filtering by Beds and Baths
Expected Result: Results show ONLY properties matching criteria.

Test Title: Verify Map boundary search updates results
Test Steps: 1. Go to Map View 2. Zoom in/Drag map
Expected Result: Property list dynamically updates to show only properties inside the visible map polygon.

Test Title: Verify property detail page loads correctly
Expected Result: Images description agent contact form and map load correctly.

Test Steps: 1. Enter Principal: $300k Down: 20% Interest: 5% Years: 30 2. Calculate
Expected Result: Estimated monthly payment is mathematically correct.

Test Steps: 1. Fill Name/Email/Message on Agent form 2. Submit
Expected Result: Success message shown. Email dispatched to Agent.

Test Title: Verify user can save property to favorites
Expected Result: Property added to Saved list. Icon turns red.

Test Title: Verify user can save search criteria for alerts
Expected Result: Search is saved in dashboard. User will receive email alerts for new matches.

Test Title: Verify Agent can submit new listing
Test Steps: 1. Go to Dashboard > Add Property 2. Fill all fields 3. Upload Images 4. Submit
Expected Result: Property saved as 'Pending Approval'. Success message shown.

Test Title: Verify required fields on listing submission
Expected Result: Validation errors on Price Title Location Images.

Test Title: Verify Admin can approve a pending listing
Test Steps: 1. Login as Admin 2. Go to Properties 3. Click Approve on a pending listing
Expected Result: Status changes to Active. Property becomes searchable on frontend.

Test Title: Verify Admin can ban an abusive Agent
Test Steps: 1. Go to Users 2. Ban Agent account
Expected Result: Agent is immediately logged out and cannot log back in.

Test Title: Verify Agent cannot edit another Agent's listing
Expected Result: 403 Forbidden. Agent A cannot modify Agent B's property.

Test Title: Verify XSS prevention on property description
Expected Result: Payload is sanitized before rendering on the public details page.
